Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface Tournaments

All Known Subinterfaces:
TournamentsAuth
public interface Tournaments
Access Arena and Swiss tournaments played on Lichess.
Official Arena tournaments are maintained by Lichess, but you can create your own Arena tournaments as well.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Result<Arena>
    arenaById(String arenaId)
    Get detailed info about recently finished, current, or upcoming tournament's duels, player standings, and other info.
    Result<Arena>
    arenaById(String arenaId, int page)
    Get detailed info about recently finished, current, or upcoming tournament's duels, player standings, and other info.
    Result<Tournament>
    arenasCreatedByUserId(String userId)
    Get all tournaments created by a given user.
    Tournaments are sorted by reverse chronological order of start date (last starting first).
    default Result<Tournament>
    arenasCreatedByUserId(String userId, Enums.TournamentState... specificStatus)
    arenasCreatedByUserId(String, Set)
    Result<Tournament>
    arenasCreatedByUserId(String userId, Set<Enums.TournamentState> specificStatus)
    Get tournaments created by a given user of specified status.
    Tournaments are sorted by reverse chronological order of start date (last starting first).
    Result<TournamentStatus>
    currentTournaments()
    Get recently finished, ongoing, and upcoming tournaments.
    Result<Game>
    gamesByArenaId(String arenaId)
    Download games of a arena tournament.
    Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
    Result<Game>
    gamesByArenaId(String arenaId, Consumer<Games.Filter> params)
    Download games of a arena tournament.
    Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
    Result<Game>
    gamesBySwissId(String swissId)
    Download games of a swiss tournament.
    ames are sorted by reverse chronological order (last round first)
    Result<Game>
    gamesBySwissId(String swissId, Consumer<Games.Filter> params)
    Download games of a swiss tournament.
    ames are sorted by reverse chronological order (last round first)
    Result<ArenaResult>
    resultsByArenaId(String arenaId)
    Players of an Arena tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
    If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
    Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
    Result<ArenaResult>
    resultsByArenaId(String arenaId, int nb)
    Players of an Arena tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
    If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
    Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
    Result<SwissResult>
    resultsBySwissId(String swissId)
    Players of a swiss tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
    If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
    Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
    Result<SwissResult>
    resultsBySwissId(String swissId, int nb)
    Players of a swiss tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
    If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
    Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
    Result<Swiss>
    swissById(String swissId)
    Get info about a Swiss tournament.
    Result<String>
    swissTRF(String swissId)
    Download a tournament in the Tournament Report File format, the FIDE standard.
    Documentation: PDF
    Example: TRF
    Result<TeamBattleResults>
    teamBattleResultsById(String tournamentId)
    Teams of a team battle tournament, with top players, sorted by rank (best first).

  • Method Details

    • currentTournaments

      Result<TournamentStatus> currentTournaments()
      Get recently finished, ongoing, and upcoming tournaments. This API is used to display the Lichess tournament schedule.

    • arenaById

      Result<Arena> arenaById(String arenaId, int page)
      Get detailed info about recently finished, current, or upcoming tournament's duels, player standings, and other info.
      Parameters:
      page - Specify which page of player standings to view. [ 1 .. 200 ]
      Default: 1

    • arenaById

      Result<Arena> arenaById(String arenaId)
      Get detailed info about recently finished, current, or upcoming tournament's duels, player standings, and other info.

    • swissById

      Result<Swiss> swissById(String swissId)
      Get info about a Swiss tournament.

    • arenasCreatedByUserId

      Result<Tournament> arenasCreatedByUserId(String userId, Set<Enums.TournamentState> specificStatus)
      Get tournaments created by a given user of specified status.
      Tournaments are sorted by reverse chronological order of start date (last starting first).

    • arenasCreatedByUserId

      Result<Tournament> arenasCreatedByUserId(String userId)
      Get all tournaments created by a given user.
      Tournaments are sorted by reverse chronological order of start date (last starting first).

    • arenasCreatedByUserId

      default Result<Tournament> arenasCreatedByUserId(String userId, Enums.TournamentState... specificStatus)
      arenasCreatedByUserId(String, Set)

    • gamesByArenaId

      Result<Game> gamesByArenaId(String arenaId, Consumer<Games.Filter> params)
      Download games of a arena tournament.
      Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)

    • gamesByArenaId

      Result<Game> gamesByArenaId(String arenaId)
      Download games of a arena tournament.
      Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)

    • gamesBySwissId

      Result<Game> gamesBySwissId(String swissId, Consumer<Games.Filter> params)
      Download games of a swiss tournament.
      ames are sorted by reverse chronological order (last round first)

    • gamesBySwissId

      Result<Game> gamesBySwissId(String swissId)
      Download games of a swiss tournament.
      ames are sorted by reverse chronological order (last round first)

    • resultsByArenaId

      Result<ArenaResult> resultsByArenaId(String arenaId, int nb)
      Players of an Arena tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
      If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
      Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
      Parameters:
      nb - Max number of players to fetch

    • resultsByArenaId

      Result<ArenaResult> resultsByArenaId(String arenaId)
      Players of an Arena tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
      If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
      Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.

    • resultsBySwissId

      Result<SwissResult> resultsBySwissId(String swissId, int nb)
      Players of a swiss tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
      If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
      Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.
      Parameters:
      nb - Max number of players to fetch

    • resultsBySwissId

      Result<SwissResult> resultsBySwissId(String swissId)
      Players of a swiss tournament, with their score and performance, sorted by rank (best first).
      If called on an ongoing tournament, results can be inconsistent due to ranking changes while the players are being streamed.
      Use on finished tournaments for guaranteed consistency.

    • swissTRF

      Result<String> swissTRF(String swissId)
      Download a tournament in the Tournament Report File format, the FIDE standard.
      Documentation: PDF
